testcase.name: testToSdkRequestWithToolResults

testcase.name: testDeserializeToRequest
testcase.system-out: 21:33:42.580 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.llm.impl.ClaudeSdkAdapterImpl -- Deserializing JSON to Claude MessageParam, role=user

testcase.name: testDeserializeToRequestWithInvalidJson
